title: 5 Rooms That Reveal Whether a Godly Man Is Actually One Guy
caption:
Same guy at church and in the empty apartment? Five rooms tell you the truth.

The locked door. The group chat with no church people in it. The work nobody double-checks. The car after a bad call. The prayer nobody hears but Him. Walk through them honestly and you'll find out fast whether you're one man or several wearing the same face.

The hidden version doesn't stay hidden forever. It either gets confessed or it starts running the rest of you.

Pick one room this week. Bring it into the light before you have to.

#faith #integrity #christianman #godlyman #discipleship #accountability
